subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! The Wronged One hath turned unto thee, He Who hath been made a target for the arrows of the oppressors. He hath come in such wise as hath caused lamentation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن قد اقبل الیک المظلوم الذی کان هدفا لسهام الظالمین قد ورد علی ما ناح به
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
